infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Patrol Tracker needs access to your location to record your patrol route.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Patrol Tracker needs continuous location access to track your patrol route during shifts.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Patrol Tracker needs camera access to take photos for field checks and incident reports.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Patrol Tracker needs continuous location access to track your patrol route during shifts.

plugins.cameraPermission: Patrol Tracker needs camera access to take photos for field checks and incident reports.

plugins.photosPermission: Patrol Tracker needs access to your photos to attach images to reports.
